MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Christopher B. Dolan of the Dolan Law Firm (421.2800) for plaintiff and responding party; Scott Wiener of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4283) for defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court will take the matter under submission upon receiving simultaneous findings and orders by counsel, which are due July 28, 2010. Plaintiff withdrew his request for sanctions. Defendant's "Rulings on Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Objections to Plaintiff's Evidence" and plaintiff's "Rulings re: Plaintiff's Objections to Evidence Submitted by Defendant in Support of its Motion for Summary Judgment", which were provided to counsel for review prior to the hearing, were returned to the clerk pending the Court's decision. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Wiener, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-437-9414 for defendant and moving party City and County of San Francisco
Bryan Lamb, Esq. of The Dolan Law Firm, 415-421-2800 for plaintiff and opposing party Frank Jones

RULING:
JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHERINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. PLAINTIFF OBJECTED AND EXERCISED A 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE BUSCH. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WAS SWORN IN.
DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OBJECTED TO THE 170.6 CHALLENGE. JUDGE BUSCH ACCEPTED THE CHALLENGE AND TRANSFERRED DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO DEPT. 302 TO BE HEARD ON 7/21/10 BY JUDGE WOOLARD. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
